violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. The dishwasher may not be used for sanitizing equipment and utensils until it is repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

Single service items observed stored on the floor in the basement storage area. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Dunnage rack recommended for dry storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
The dishwasher was not in good repair. The 3 bay sink must be used for sanitizing equipment and utensils. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink and dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2025

Cobwebs observed on the window ledge in the kitchen above the warewashing area. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
